ambiguity: "README" is specified generically, not as an exact filename/path.
"Current status" content is not concretely defined.
"Verify the final file state" does not specify a verification procedure or acceptance criteria.
assumptions: A README-type file exists or is expected in the repository.
The requested update is limited to documentation scope.
constraints: Repository root must be treated as live_appv2_probe_repo.
README change must be small and safe.
Update should record current status only.
Final file state must be verified after the update.
context_needed: Exact README filename/path to edit (for example, README vs README.md).
What source of truth should define "current status" content.
How "verify the final file state" should be performed and reported.
envelope.normalized_input: Inspect the workspace in live_appv2_probe_repo, make a minimal safe README status update, and verify the resulting file state.
envelope.raw_input: In the repo rooted at live_appv2_probe_repo, inspect the workspace, make a small safe README update that records the current status, and verify the final file state.
envelope.user_goal: Have the repository workspace reviewed, a small safe README status note added, and the final file state verified.

artifact_contracts.description: Runtime scope input identifying the repository root.
Runtime scope input identifying the README target token from the user request.
Discovery output describing workspace layout, README candidate resolution, and status evidence source.

metadata.purpose: resolve README path and gather factual status inputs before mutation

artifact_contracts.description: Pre-mutation observation of the selected README file state.

metadata.purpose: baseline evidence for safe minimal edit

artifact_contracts.description: Mutation record for the minimal safe README status update.
Verification evidence proving final README file state after mutation.
Final user-facing summary grounded in discovery, mutation, and verification artifacts.

global_invariants: Treat repository root as exact literal: live_appv2_probe_repo.
Preserve user documentation target literal: README.
Limit mutation scope to a small, safe, documentation-only README status update.
Do not claim repository state, file changes, or verification success without runtime evidence artifacts.
VERIFY phase must occur after MUTATE and must verify final file state of the edited README path.
If README path or status source remains ambiguous, record ambiguity explicitly in artifacts and final report instead of inventing facts.
phase_plan.objective: Inspect the workspace in live_appv2_probe_repo, make a minimal safe status update to README, and verify the final file state.

acceptance_checks: repository_root is recorded as live_appv2_probe_repo in discovery output.
README candidates are listed and selection_basis explains why selected_readme_path is chosen or unresolved.
pre-state observation is captured before any file write.
phases.goal: Resolve the README path within the repository root and capture pre-mutation status evidence.
instructions: Use repository-root scope input exactly as provided.
Inspect workspace layout to identify README candidate files that satisfy the README literal target.
Select the best README path when evidence is sufficient; otherwise keep selected_readme_path as null and record ambiguity.
Capture current status evidence from repository files only; do not invent status facts.
Capture pre-mutation observation (existence, excerpt, line count) for the selected README path before any mutation.

acceptance_checks: Mutation record target_path matches selected_readme_path from discovery.
change is small and safe with clear diff_summary and bytes_changed.
phases.goal: Apply a minimal documentation-only status update to the selected README path.
instructions: Proceed only if DISCOVER identified a concrete selected_readme_path; otherwise produce no mutation and carry ambiguity forward.
Keep edit scope minimal and safe, limited to README documentation content.
Record before/after excerpts and summarize the precise change.

metadata.reason: Exact README path is discovered at runtime; enforce single-file README-only update.

acceptance_checks: Verification artifact includes target_path, exists_after, post_content_excerpt, post_line_count, and verification_steps.
constraints_satisfied contains all four required booleans.
Verification is grounded in observed post-mutation file state.
phases.goal: Verify final README file state and constraint compliance after mutation.
instructions: Read final state of the mutated README target path.
Capture existence, post-update excerpt, and post-update line count.
Evaluate and set all required constraint flags based on runtime evidence.

commands: Confirm target README path exists after mutation.
Capture post-update README excerpt and line count.
Cross-check updated content against mutation record summary.

acceptance_checks: Final report includes objective, result, edited_file, summary, evidence_artifact_ids, and remaining_ambiguities.
evidence_artifact_ids references discovery, mutation, and verification artifacts.
No unsupported claim appears in summary.
phases.goal: Produce final status report grounded in discovery, mutation, and verification artifacts.
instructions: Summarize what was inspected, changed, and verified using artifact evidence only.
Set result to completed only if verification evidence confirms constraints and final file state.
If any ambiguity remains, list it explicitly in remaining_ambiguities.
Reference evidence artifact ids used for conclusions.

phase_plan.strategy: Discover repository layout and the correct README target plus current status evidence, apply the smallest documentation-only change, then verify the resulting file state and report completion.
success_criteria: DISCOVER produces workspace_readme_discovery with a selected_readme_path (or explicit unresolved ambiguity) and current_status_evidence entries.
DISCOVER produces readme_pre_state_observation for the selected README path before any mutation.
MUTATE produces readme_status_update_record showing a minimal documentation_only change to the selected README path.
VERIFY produces readme_final_state_verification with constraints_satisfied flags all true when result is completed.
FINALIZE produces final_status_update_report that references discovery, mutation, and verification artifact ids as evidence.
Final report result is completed only when verification evidence confirms final file state and invariant compliance.

prompt: In the repo rooted at live_appv2_probe_repo, inspect the workspace, make a small safe README update that records the current status, and verify the final file state.

content.selection_basis: No README candidates found. repo_snapshot confirmed live_appv2_probe_repo does not exist or is empty (exists:false, is_empty:true, no files, no directories). file_search for README* returned zero matches.
